title: Money Maze Puzzle Box (2 Pack) for Kids and Teens, Makes Cash Gift Giving More Fun
features: [Perfect for Christmas or Birthdays]: Fun and unique cash or gift-giving for loved ones, kids, and adults. The Maze box is a piggy bank, challenging puzzle, and fantastic gift all in one. An affordable addition that makes your gift extraordinary.

[STEM Gifts for Kids]: This set of engaging money maze puzzle boxes not only sparks children's creative thinking but also supports the development of their balance, hand-eye coordination, and spatial awareness.

[2-Piece Money Gift Boxes]: Two colorful maze boxes (blue, green) that are adorable and attractive. Interior storage volume is about 45 x 45 x 61mm, and the lock hole is approximately 43mm in diameter. Note that items must fit through the hole. Compatible Coins: 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50 pence coins, and 2 pound coins; it is not compatible with 1 pound coins

[Unlocking the Treasure]: To retrieve the money from the maze puzzle box, you must first solve the maze. Navigate the ball to the designated position, push the slide bar, and the lid will open, revealing the reward. Easy to obtain the money with patience, and these puzzle boxes are reusable.

[Endless Fun to Play]: This maze puzzle game elevates gift-giving by taking recipients on a fun journey. It strikes the perfect balance, neither too difficult nor too easy with various game modes (single-player game or multiplayer game).
description: Product Description iKeelo 2 Pack Money Maze Puzzle Boxes (Green + Blue) Note: The 2 maze boxes are packed together in one colored paper box 3-in-1 Maze Box : This set of engaging maze puzzles not only sparks children's creative thinking but also supports the development of their balance, hand-eye coordination, and spatial awareness, making it a great gift choice for Birthdays and Christmas. Compatible Coins: 1 / 2 / 5 /10 / 20 / 50 pence coins, and 2 pound coin (these coins can be insert through the hole as their thickness < 2.6 mm); Non-Compatible Coin: 1 pound coin as its thickness is 2.8 mm. You may open the lid and put the 1 pound coin into the maze box. Four Play Modes Previous page Battle Mode Difficulty Level: Medium A multiplayer game. The first individual unlocks the maze box within the time wins. Blind box Mode Difficulty Level: Easy A single-player game. Pick a box at random and unveil a surprise gift by solving the maze puzzle. Challenge Mode Difficulty Level: Hard A single-player or multiplayer game. The player should secure a blindfold &open the box w/o peeking Casual Mode Difficulty Level: Easy A single-player game.Pick a box &tackle the maze puzzle at your own pace, with no time restrictions Next page What objects can fit inside the box? What is the internal storage size? The internal storage size is 45mm×45mm×61mm. You can put in paper money, candy, tickets, keychains, and more. Fits most British coins, eg, 1/2/5/10/20/50 pence and 2 pound coin, but not for 1 pound coin. How is the suggested method of play? Playable in both single-player and multiplayer modes. It features various game modes, including casual, battle, blind box, and challenge modes How to put the lid back on? Align the lid with the bayonet and put it back with a little force Why does the lid not open when the slide switch is toggled? Please ensure that your hand doesn't obstruct the lid, preventing it from popping up. Puzzle Box Directions. Note: knowing the solution may spoil the fun!
